overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-drenched cyberpunk city at night, featuring massive digital billboards and futuristic vehicles. The camera ascends a grimy concrete stairwell and enters a prismatic rainbow-colored glass tunnel. The footage is clearly from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity cinematic rendering and atmospheric lighting.

events.description: pedestrian in bright pink jacket passes close by on the left, temporarily blocking view
passing traffic light pole with red signal visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, observing the neon advertisements and street activity

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink jacket walking in opposite direction, passing by the camera around 18 seconds

multiple layered digital screens displaying advertisements suspended above the street

futuristic cars and trucks driving along the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night, walking forward along a tiled sidewalk. Massive digital billboards including a prominent red 'ChroManticore' advertisement dominate the right side, while vehicles pass by on the left. A pedestrian in a pink jacket walks past in the opposite direction, and the camera passes traffic lights as it continues down the commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell connecting street level to upper pedestrian walkway

events.description: entering enclosed concrete stairwell from the open neon-lit street
continuing ascent up the stairs, following a pedestrian ahead

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs, following another pedestrian upward toward the upper level

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored clothing ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with visible wear, stains, and grime
rough gray concrete walls of the stairwell enclosure
metal railings along both sides of the staircase for support
fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the stairwell ceiling providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open street into a narrow, enclosed concrete stairwell. The camera ascends the grimy stairs with metal handrails on both sides, following a pedestrian ahead. Fluorescent lights illuminate the gray concrete walls as the city view becomes visible through openings on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with colorful arched glass tunnel

events.description: exiting stairwell onto upper concrete walkway with glass windows overlooking the street below
entering the rainbow-colored arched glass tunnel with prismatic lighting effects

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper level and entering the brightly lit rainbow tunnel, following the pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead into the rainbow tunnel, gradually moving further into the distance

entered.detail: series of colorful arched frames in rainbow colors creating a prismatic tunnel effect
large glass panels providing view down to the street level from the elevated walkway
elevated pedestrian path with concrete surface connecting the stairs to the tunnel
small illuminated structure with glass front on the upper walkway before the tunnel entrance
transparent glass walls of the rainbow tunnel showing the city outside

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell onto an elevated walkway, the camera passes glass windows overlooking the street below before entering a striking rainbow-colored glass tunnel. The tunnel features prismatic arched frames in multiple colors creating a futuristic corridor effect, with debris scattered on the walkway floor. The pedestrian ahead continues walking deeper into the colorful tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial street into a confined concrete stairwell and finally through a prismatic glass tunnel. It begins by walking along a tiled sidewalk beneath massive digital billboards, including a prominent red ChroManticore advertisement, as vehicles pass by and a pedestrian in a pink jacket walks in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts from the open city air into a narrow, grimy concrete stairwell, ascending past metal handrails and fluorescent lights while glimpses of the city remain visible through side openings. As the camera emerges onto an elevated walkway, it passes glass windows overlooking the street before entering a striking rainbow-colored glass tunnel. The movement concludes by following the pedestrian deeper into this futuristic corridor of prismatic arched frames and scattered debris.
